contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: Align store_interaction_history Status dropdown with canonical States tab
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/192
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Aligned the `Update Status & Shop Type` dropdown on `store_interaction_history.html` with the canonical Hit-List `States` tab (column B `exact_value` is source of truth per the tab's own header). Seven `AI:*` statuses were missing from the page's `<select>`, including `AI: Enrich with contact` — operator hit this on the Sun&Moon store row when trying to flip it into the contact-enrichment AI pipeline and the option wasn't there.
  
  Added (in canonical order, AI:* clustered together so an operator scanning for "AI: …" finds them adjacent):
  
  - `AI: Shortlisted`
  - `AI: Photo rejected`
  - `AI: Photo needs review`
  - `AI: Enrich with contact` ← the one the operator needed
  - `AI: Email found`
  - `AI: Contact Form found`
  - `AI: Enrich — manual`
  
  Removed `Deferred / Revisit later` — not on the canonical States tab. Existing Hit-List rows that still carry that value render fine (the page filters what's selectable, not what it can display).
  
  Added a code-comment guard at the top of the `<select>` noting the source-of-truth contract: any new Status added to the States tab should be added here verbatim. Catches drift at edit time.
  
  ## Why
  
  Without `AI: Enrich with contact` in the dropdown, an operator can't promote a store into the AI contact-enrichment queue from the per-store interaction-history page. They'd have to edit the Hit-List sheet directly, which bypasses the `[RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT]` audit trail (Telegram Chat Logs row, DApp Remarks row, Stores Visits Field Reports row). Aligning the dropdown to the canonical list closes that gap and prevents the same drift on the other six AI:* statuses.
  
  ## Pull request
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/192 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
